Meaning.En: To decide or announce that something will not happen, especially officially or formally.
Meaning.Example: We had to cancel our vacation due to bad weather.

Situation.Vi: Hủy đặt chỗ, đặt tour, hoặc sự kiện đã lên kế hoạch.
Situation.En: Canceling a reservation, trip, or planned event, often with a notice or formal request.

Situation.Vi: Hủy bỏ một thỏa thuận, hợp đồng, hoặc cam kết.
Situation.En: Terminating a contract, agreement, or commitment before it is fulfilled.

Meaning.Vi: Xóa, gạch bỏ (văn bản, số liệu)
Meaning.En: To mark something (e.g., text or a number) as invalid or incorrect by drawing a line through it.
Meaning.Example: She canceled the incorrect entry by drawing a single line through it.

Situation.Vi: Gạch chéo một mục trong danh sách hoặc hóa đơn vì không còn cần thiết hoặc đã thanh toán.
Situation.En: Marking an item on a list or invoice as processed or no longer applicable by crossing it out.
